summary: A CMC-powered autonomous trading agent. Every market decision is derived from CoinMarketCap data: a regime classifier routes exposure, a multi-factor alpha blend ranks BSC-eligible assets, and liquidity/security gates protect execution. This descriptor declares the exact CMC dataset -> capability lineage so a CMC Agent Hub consumer can verify, discover, and call the agent's read-only analysis surface.
execution_policy: read-only — the agent NEVER exposes trade execution, signing, or fund movement to the hub. Only CMC-derived analysis is published. The Rust risk engine remains the sole execution gate, reachable only by the internal trading binary.

capabilities.description: Classifies the market into risk-on / risk-off / chop / breakout from CMC Fear & Greed, global metrics, and quote momentum.
Ranks BSC-eligible assets with a multi-factor blend (momentum + RSI + MACD + volume + volatility + liquidity + sentiment + execution-quality, minus a security penalty).
Runs the real Rust strategy + risk + backtester over a CMC-derived universe for any published Track-2 skill.
Per-asset DEX liquidity and headroom used to gate order sizing.
Compiles a natural-language mandate into a validated, hashed risk policy (CMC-eligible assets only).
